shadow_strike.name: Shadow Strike
shadow_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike from the dark. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Umbral Pip.

blindside.name: Blindside
blindside.description: Setup: Strike from an unexpected angle. Generates 1 Umbral Pip and applies [Marked].

nightfall_execute.name: Nightfall
nightfall_execute.description: Payoff: A lethal puncture that ignores all defense in the dark. Consumes 5 Umbral Pips.

shadow_cleave.name: Shadow Cleave
shadow_cleave.description: Payoff: A wide strike that splashes shadows onto enemies. Consumes 3 Umbral Pips to deal damage and apply [Blinded].

shroud_of_night.name: Shroud of Night
shroud_of_night.description: Defense: Wrap yourself in absolute darkness. Grants [Concealed] for 8 ticks.

umbral_reflexes.name: Umbral Reflexes
umbral_reflexes.description: Defense: Move as if part of the shadows. Increases Evasiveness by 50% for 4 ticks.

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.description: Mobility: Teleport to any source of shadow within visual range.

dark_vision.name: Dark Vision
dark_vision.description: Utility: See perfectly in magical darkness for 100 ticks.

shadow_blade_physiology.name: Shadow Blade Physiology
shadow_blade_physiology.description: Passive: Born in Dark. You gain 20% bonus damage and 20% Evasiveness while [Concealed].
